finding: Homepage lacks a clear semantic H1 (interior pages have one).
recommendation: Add one descriptive H1 to the homepage (brand + primary term).

finding: Headings split into styled spans remove word spacing (“Raiseyourgame”) and fragment into stacked H2s.
recommendation: Rebuild as single headings with normal spacing and a clean H1→H2→H3 order.

finding: Images served as JPG/PNG, not next-gen WebP/AVIF.
recommendation: Convert to WebP/AVIF with responsive sizes; biggest LCP win.

finding: Homepage hero loads a large brand film (.webm) — LCP/bandwidth risk.
recommendation: Ensure deferred/lazy load, poster image, not blocking LCP; consider compressed loop.

finding: Legacy /about-us/ page still indexed, outside main nav, outdated content (old “Quantum” naming).
recommendation: 301 to /why-sportingtech/ OR refresh & re-link; treat as orphan/duplicate-intent.

finding: hreflang reciprocity across EN/PT/ES not verified; og:locale hard-set to en_US.
recommendation: Confirm reciprocal hreflang + x-default and per-locale og:locale and <html lang>.

finding: Inconsistent/missing image alt text (e.g. Genius Sports logo, “Built for performance” image empty alt).
recommendation: Populate descriptive alt on meaningful images; keep decorative alt intentionally empty.
Confirm exists, not blocking CSS/JS or PT/ES paths, references sitemap.

finding: XML sitemap not confirmed remotely (Yoast index likely).
recommendation: Confirm sitemap lists EN/PT/ES, excludes redirects/404s; submit in Search Console.

finding: No field Core Web Vitals baseline (LCP/INP/CLS).
recommendation: Run Lighthouse + CrUX/PSI; re-test after image/video fixes. No numbers assumed.

finding: JSON-LD schema graph completeness not confirmed.
recommendation: Validate Organization(+sameAs,address), WebSite(SearchAction), BreadcrumbList; add Article to news.

finding: GA4 firing through GTM not confirmed across locales.
recommendation: Verify GA4 config + key conversions (demo/contact) across EN/PT/ES.

finding: Some Google snippets fall back to generic tagline (page descriptions are present/unique).
recommendation: Confirm via full crawl no genuinely missing descriptions; otherwise Google snippet rewrite.

finding: Production images use placeholder file names (placeholder-mobiles, placeholder-laptop-girl).
recommendation: Confirm finals are in place; rename/replace placeholder assets.

finding: /resources/ paginated to 11 pages — pagination canonical handling unconfirmed.
recommendation: Confirm paginated pages self-canonicalise (not back to page 1).

finding: HSTS / CSP headers and exposed-file check not confirmed.
recommendation: Confirm HSTS, CSP, and no exposed .env/.git/staging.
Layer target terms (e.g. “Casino Software Platform”) into H1/intro.
